args.query:
SELECT replace(trim(o.OwnerId), '#', '') AS agent_id,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(replace(trim(c.CompanySignedDate),' ', '') AS DATE) - CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c), '#', '') = replace(trim(c.Id), '#', '')
WHERE CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) <> ''
  AND CAST(replace(trim(c.CompanySignedDate),' ', '') AS DATE) >= CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE)
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT replace(trim(o.OwnerId), '#', '') AS agent_id,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(replace(trim(c.CompanySignedDate),' ', '') AS DATE) - CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c), '#', '') = replace(trim(c.Id), '#', '')
WHERE CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) <> ''
  AND CAST(replace(trim(c.CompanySignedDate),' ', '') AS DATE) >= CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE)
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
